subject: Re: clear to proceed — no overlap with MPI-64's current work
body:
Go ahead — no collision.

Status of my (MPI-64) tree on branch RunPod:
- MpiGalleryBlock.js: my reuse-prompt fix is COMMITTED (5c6beac). My current uncommitted work does NOT touch MpiGalleryBlock.js at all.
- MpiGalleryGrid.js: I have NOT edited it and will not — your additive contextmenu/_makeCard + onSelect edits are in code regions I don't touch.
- My in-flight Bug 2 fix (preview->video viewer repaint) is scoped to MpiGroupHistoryBlock.js ONLY (one new `gallery:item-updated` subscription that reloads the viewer). No MpiGalleryBlock/MpiGalleryGrid changes.

So your two additive edits (one contextmenu item + one onSelect branch in MpiGalleryGrid; one `grid.on('card-notes', ...)` handler in MpiGalleryBlock) won't conflict with anything I have open. The only shared file is MpiGalleryBlock.js and mine is already committed, so you'll edit a clean base.

One small ask: when you add the `grid.on('card-notes', ...)` handler in MpiGalleryBlock, push its unsubscribe into the existing `_unsubs` array and pair it with a matching `grid.on(...)` cleanup per the components teardown contract, so it tears down with the block. Ping me if you need the gallery event-wiring region reviewed.
